column1: # clients.csv — Client and Owner seed list
# This file defines which clients (companies) are monitored and who owns each
# client relationship. Edit this file freely to add
#   • Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored.
#   • The first non-comment line must be the header: name
#   • Both columns are required for every row.
#   • Leading/trailing whitespace around values is stripped automatically.
